name: Wilfred (tto-agent)
description: AI assistant for technology transfer offices. Django 6 + Channels (WebSocket chat) + Celery, multi-provider LLM, and pgvector RAG over uploaded data rooms.

DJANGO_CSRF_TRUSTED_ORIGINS.description: Comma-separated origins, e.g. https://your-app.herokuapp.com. Required or form posts return 403.

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: Required: pgvector embeddings + OpenAI LLM provider.

LLM_DEFAULT_CHEAP_MODEL.description: Fast model for descriptions and classification.

PGBOUNCER_POOL_MODE.description: In-dyno PgBouncer pool mode. Keep 'transaction' — required by disable_server_side_cursors in settings.py.

PGBOUNCER_DEFAULT_POOL_SIZE.description: Real Postgres connections PgBouncer opens per dyno (web and worker each ~ this many). 5 for essential-0 (20-conn cap), 10 for essential-2 (40), 25 for standard-0 (120).

PGBOUNCER_MAX_CLIENT_CONN.description: Max app-side connections to the in-dyno PgBouncer (cheap; lets app concurrency exceed the real pool size).

SENTRY_DSN.description: Optional: error tracking. Disabled if unset.

EMAIL_SENDING_ENABLED.description: Optional: enable outbound email (Mailgun backend). Default false.
